scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:test --prefix backend"
scripts.test: npm run test:mock && npm run coverage --prefix backend && npm run coverage --prefix frontend
scripts.quality:extended: npm run test:load && npm run test:visual
scripts.ci: npm run test:mock && npm run test:integration && npm test --prefix frontend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.reliability: npm run ci && npm run coverage
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --prefix backend && npm run coverage --prefix frontend
